ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-24-2013 Continued To Nov-19-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Mangini for Tod Nash.

Mr. Mangini explained that there is one other lease agreement for a house boat berth, that title is in the name of the Spouse of the Decedent, that it will not be inventoried and that he will finalize the petition. Status on filing of the Petition for Final Distribution was continued to November 19, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The petition is to be filed by November 12, 2013.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
